channel.title: pursuit on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in pursuit on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: Mice Make Art!
item.description: Concept The concept is the following: Having N mice, deploy them randomly in a rectangular area. Each mouse targets exactly one other mouse. Every mouse is targeted by one mouse, forming a circle of references-targets. Phenomena Each mouse \(A\) is confined in the rectangular area: since it targets a mouse \(B\) that is within the rectangular area, it moves in this direction. Mouse \(B\) itself targets a mouse \(C\) which for the same reason is in the rectangular area.
